# Step 06: Modernize Java Code with Java 21 Features
# Generated by GH Copilot CLI - Spec2Cloud Methodology

## Changes Made

### Records (Java 16+)
- web/model/S3StorageItem.java → record (replaced @Data/@NoArgsConstructor/@AllArgsConstructor)
- web/model/ImageProcessingMessage.java → record (replaced Lombok annotations)
- worker/model/ImageProcessingMessage.java → record (replaced Lombok annotations)

### Sealed Interfaces (Java 17+)
- StorageService → sealed interface permits AwsS3Service, LocalFileStorageService
- FileProcessor → sealed interface permits AbstractFileProcessingService
- AwsS3Service → final class (sealed permit)
- LocalFileStorageService → final class (sealed permit)
- AbstractFileProcessingService → non-sealed abstract class

### Local Variable Type Inference (var, Java 10+)
- Applied var throughout: S3Controller, AwsS3Service, LocalFileStorageService,
  WebMvcConfig, S3FileProcessingService, AbstractFileProcessingService
- Used for builder patterns, collection assignments, stream results, local vars

### Switch Expressions with Pattern Matching (Java 21)
- WebMvcConfig.determineFileOperation() → switch expression with pattern matching guards

### Record Accessor Updates
- All .getKey()/.getName()/.getSize() calls → .key()/.name()/.size() record accessors
- Updated in: S3Controller, AwsS3Service, LocalFileStorageService, 
  BackupMessageProcessor, AbstractFileProcessingService

### Virtual Threads (Java 21)
- Added spring.threads.virtual.enabled=true to both web and worker application.properties

### Unused Import Cleanup
- Removed unused imports across multiple files

### Build Verification
- Maven clean compile: SUCCESS with all Java 21 features
